data.title: Labrador Gold Closes First Tranche of Option Agreement with Pacific Ridge and Updates Exploration at the Mariposa and Eureka Dome Projects, White Gold District, Yukon
data.description: Labrador Gold Corp. (TSX.V: LAB | FNR: 2N6) has started exploration programs for the Mariposa and Eureka Dome projects. The company closed the first part of the Option Agreement with Pacific Ridge Exploration Limited (PEX: TSXV; PEXZF: OTCQB) by making a $100,000 cash payment and issuing 800,000 common shares. The shares have a resale restriction expiring on October 30, 2026.

data.title: ADDING and REPLACING CoStar Group Announces Launch of CoStar Platform in France
data.description: In Paris, Costar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP) has announced the launch of the Costar Platform in France. This move aims to empower investors, brokers, owners, and occupiers in France's commercial real estate market, estimated at a value of €300 billion. Costar Group, an S&P 500 company and a top player in real estate globally, will provide essential data and analytics to support success in the market. This introduction of the Costar Platform will offer key resources for navigating and thriving in France's significant commercial real estate sector.

data.title: Simplilearn Launches SkillUp - The AI-First Skilling Library Built for the Age of AI
data.description: In Plano, Texas on July 2, 2026, it was reported that with the changing landscape of work, individuals require tailored learning opportunities to address the skills gap. Access to online courses is no longer sufficient; personalized learning experiences are crucial. Simplilearn is at the forefront of offering these specialized educational tools to help learners and professionals navigate their way through this evolving work environment.

data.title: Kane Biotech Announces Results of Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: Winnipeg, Manitoba - On July 2, 2026, Kane Biotech Inc. (TSX-V:KNE) released the outcome of its annual and special shareholder meeting held on June 24, 2026. The Company, also known as Kane Biotech, disclosed the voting results from the meeting.

data.title: Eight Carolinas Transportation Projects Named Among 250 Milestone Projects
data.description: A recent report has showcased the essential infrastructure supporting the American success narrative. The American Road & Transportation Builders Association (ARTBA) recently revealed a list of 250 key transportation projects in honor of the U.S.'s 250th anniversary. Through this unveiling, the significance of infrastructure in facilitating the nation's growth and prosperity becomes apparent. The report aims to underscore the crucial role of infrastructure as the country marks this milestone, emphasizing the ongoing need for investment and development in the sector. This initiative provides valuable insights into the infrastructure projects driving America's success story, showcasing the essential role played by transportation systems in the nation's advancement.

data.title: 7-Eleven, Inc. Satisfies Big Cravings with New Hot Sandwiches Nationwide
data.description: In a recent announcement from IRVING, Texas on July 2, 2026, 7-Eleven, Inc. revealed the introduction of a fresh range of hot sandwiches to their stores. The menu now includes options such as crispy chicken, double cheeseburgers, and melty cheesesteaks. These new additions cater to customers looking for spicy and flavorful bites. One standout option is the Hot as Fire (Hot AF!) sandwich, designed to tantalize taste buds with its fiery flavors. Visit a nearby 7-Eleven store to try out these delectable offerings.

data.title: StablecoinX Launches StablecoinX Harness: Stablecoin Orchestration Platform to Accelerate USDe Adoption
data.description: StablecoinX Inc. (Nasdaq: “USDE”) has recently unveiled its flagship infrastructure software platform, StablecoinX Harness, which aims to simplify stablecoin operations within the Ethena digital dollar ecosystem. The platform abstracts the intricacies of stablecoin procedures into a consolidated integration, offering a powerful middleware technology stack for users. This marks a significant milestone for the company as it delves deeper into the public stablecoin sector.

data.title: Metropolitan Commercial Bank Announces Appointment of Jason Bishop as Group Head of Commercial Real Estate Lending
data.description: In New York, Metropolitan Commercial Bank (MCB) has appointed Jason Bishop as the Group Head of Commercial Real Estate Lending (CRE). This move showcases the bank's dedication to providing personalized commercial lending solutions and achieving sustainable growth. Bishop will be responsible for leading MCB's CRE Lending division, managing tasks such as business development, portfolio expansion, and strategic lending projects. This appointment signifies MCB's commitment to excellence in financial services and long-term viability.

data.title: Ohalo® Names Seed Industry Veteran Justin Wolfe as President and Chief Operating Officer
data.description: Justin Wolfe, the previous President of Global Seeds at Syngenta, with more than 30 years of experience in commercial and operational leadership, has joined Ohalo® to spearhead the commercial scaling of their Boosted® seed business. Ohalo® made the announcement on July 2, 2026, revealing Wolfe's appointment to leverage his expertise in driving the growth of their seed business.

data.title: Hansa Biopharma participating in Wedbush PacGrow Renal Summit
data.description: In Lund, Sweden on July 2, 2026, Hansa Biopharma AB shared news that Maria Törnsén, COO and President U.S., will be taking part in a fireside chat titled "Don't Be So Sensitive - Bringing Kidneys to the Over-Sensitized". For those interested, the chat will feature innovative insights related to this topic. Hansa Biopharma is identified on Nasdaq Stockholm as HNSA for interested investors.

data.title: Caliber Advances Real Estate Fund Tokenization Strategy with Chainlink’s Compliance and Distribution Infrastructure
data.description: A real estate asset manager listed on the Nasdaq exchange is directing attention towards the final phase of tokenization. This involves simplifying the process of accessing, verifying, managing, and distributing private real estate funds via regulated means. The initiative is supported by Chainlink's oracle platform. This move is aimed at enhancing accessibility to private real estate funds and ensuring compliance through secure channels.

data.title: Honeywell Community Solar Project SB-14 Successfully Achieves Commercial Operation in Upstate New York
data.description: A recent project has been successfully completed under a Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) agreement worth US$41 million as a component of the larger 21 MW DC Honeywell portfolio situated in upstate New York. The completed project is a 7.01 MW DC ground-mount solar facility that is now fully operational. This facility has the capacity to generate clean energy that can power approximately 875 households on an annual basis. It is anticipated that this project will function as a community-centered initiative, providing sustainable energy solutions for the local area.

data.title: Arclin Celebrates America's 250th Anniversary with Fabric of America Fund
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Alpharetta, Georgia, Arclin, a prominent materials science company, disclosed the introduction of the Fabric of America Fund. This initiative is a nationwide endeavor led by employees, aimed at honoring America's 250th anniversary. It seeks to bolster communities across the country through charitable contributions.
